zh.lifeSummary: 當Ameria de Kenyon於1337年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾凱尼恩時，她的父親Adam de Kenyon III27歲，母親Matilda Maud de Hesketh32歲。她於大約1355年與Richard de Holland I在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯特維其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年在法國諾門迪艾布利奧安享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯特維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ameria de Kenyon于1337年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾凱尼恩时，她的父亲Adam de Kenyon III27岁，母亲Matilda Maud de Hesketh32岁。她于大约1355年与Richard de Holland I在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯特維其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1385年在法国諾門迪艾布利奧安享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯特維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kenyon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Warrington, which is of uncertain etymology. There was formerly an ancient burial mound there and Ekwall has speculated that the name is a shortened form of a British name composed of the elements crūc ‘mound’ + a personal name cognate with Welsh Einion (see Eynon ).

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinín ‘son of Coinín’, a byname based on a diminutive of cano ‘wolf’, also Anglicized as Canning and Cunneen . The similarity to the borrowed word coinín ‘coney, rabbit’ has sometimes caused this name to be Anglicized as Rabbitt .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhinghin, ‘son of Finghen’, a personal name meaning ‘fair-born’.

variants.name: Eynon
meanings: Welsh: from Enniaun, an old Welsh personal name ultimately derived from Late Latin Annianus, but also associated with Welsh einion ‘anvil’, taken as implying stability and fortitude. See also Beynon and compare Onion .

variants.name: Kinion
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Kenyon  . Compare   Kinyon  .

variants.name: Kinyon
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Kenyon  . Compare   Kinion  .

nameMeanings.name: Ameria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A blend of two medieval names: Emilia (which is of Latin origin: see Emily ) and the Latinized Germanic Amalia . Henry Fielding is sometimes credited with having coined it for the heroine of his novel Amelia ( 1751 ), but forms such as Meelia, Amaly and Aemelia occur from the 17th century onwards.

en.lifeSummary: When Ameria de Kenyon was born in 1337, in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Adam de Kenyon III, was 27 and her mother, Matilda Maud de Hesketh, was 32. She married Richard de Holland I about 1355, in Prestwich, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1385, in Brionne, Eure, Normandy, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Prestwich, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ameria de Kenyon est née en 1337, à Kenyon, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam de Kenyon III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Matilda Maud de Hesketh, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Holland I environ 1355, à Prestwich, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1385, à Brionne, Eure, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Prestwich, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ameria de Kenyon 1337 in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Kenyon III 27 und ihre Mutter Matilda Maud de Hesketh 32. Sie hat um 1355 in Prestwich, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Richard de Holland I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1385 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Brionne, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Prestwich, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ameria de Kenyon è nata il nel 1337 nel Kenyon, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Adam de Kenyon III, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Matilda Maud de Hesketh, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Holland I circa 1355, nel Prestwich, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1385, nel Brionne, Eure, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Prestwich, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ameria de Kenyonが1337年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアケニーオンで生まれた時，父Adam de Kenyon IIIは27歳，母Matilda Maud de Heskethは32歳であった。約1355年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストウィチでRichard de Holland Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1385年にフランスノーマンディエウアブリオンで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ameria de Kenyon(이)가 1337년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 켄욘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Kenyon III(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Maud de Hesketh(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스트위치에서 Richard de Holland I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 브리오니에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스트위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ameria de Kenyon nasceu em 1337, em Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam de Kenyon III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Maud de Hesketh, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Holland I aproximadamente 1355, em Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1385, em Brionne, Eure, Normandie, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ameria de Kenyon родилась в 1337 г. в местности кенен, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Adam de Kenyon III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Maud de Hesketh, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Holland I около 1355 г. в местности прествич, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1385 г. в местности брионн, эур, норманди, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности прествич, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ameria de Kenyon nació en 1337, en Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam de Kenyon III, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Matilda Maud de Hesketh, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Richard de Holland I aproximadamente 1355, en Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1385, en Brionne, Eure, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
